next_steps: Lemma complete, axiom-clean. \lean{} pin added to blueprint lem:tile_image_opens_identities by review.

findings.blocker: Sub-lemma B (tile_section_comparison) is genuinely non-definitional: the tile section (modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (modulesRestrictBasicOpen g F)).presheaf.obj (op V) is a ModuleCat R_g (local ring Localization.Away g) while the F-side section (modulesSpecToSheaf.obj F).presheaf.obj (op (ι ''ᵁ V)) is a ModuleCat R — NOT the same type. Carriers and scalar coherence are not rfl. Confirmed by clean `lake env lean`; the run_code/LSP successes were stale-olean artifacts.
